title: opilia manillana
intro: Opilia manillana, also known as Manila mulberry, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Opilia manillana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are commonly used in traditional remedies.
